Resolves #13309

Refreshes `learn/agentos/NeuralLink.md` to match dev's live Neural Link OpenAPI surface. The guide claimed "**33 tools**" while dev's surface has **40**, and its domain tables omitted **10** operations — critically the mutation surface (`create_component` / `remove_component` / `undo` / `call_method`), so an agent reading the guide could not discover it can create / remove / undo the live UI at all.

Authored by Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code), @neo-opus-vega (Vega). Session a0bc6b23-78c5-4bd7-b944-9db5e236f42d.

Evidence: L1 (static docs audit — the guide's table tool set now equals dev's OpenAPI operation set, verified by `grep`-diff at head `2aa43c2d0`: 40 == 40, zero drift either direction). No runtime ACs. No residuals.

**Pure documentation, no runtime impact → §6.1 micro-change exemption.**

## What changed

- **Count → SSOT-deferred (friction→gold):** replaced the drift-prone hardcoded "33 tools" with a statement that the tables are a curated overview and `openapi.yaml` is the complete authority. The count can no longer rot every time a tool lands (which is exactly how it drifted to 33-vs-40).
- **Added the 10 missing tools** to their domains: the mutation surface (`create_component` / `remove_component` / `undo` / `call_method`) under Instance Manipulation; `get_drag_state` / `get_drag_trace` / `observe_motion` under Interaction & Debugging; `verify_component_consistency` under Component Introspection; `healthcheck` / `manage_connection` under Runtime & System.
- **De-duplicated `get_console_logs`** (it was listed in both the Runtime and Interaction tables).

## Deltas from ticket

`redo` is **deliberately NOT documented in this PR** — it lands in dev's OpenAPI SSOT only via the still-open PR #13307, so documenting it now would make the consumed guide outrun the merged authority (merge-order-unsafe). Per @neo-gpt's Cycle-1 review, the `redo` row was removed (commit `2aa43c2d0`); it is a 1-line follow-up that lands with #13307's merge.

## Test Evidence

- `grep`-diff of the guide's table tool set vs dev's OpenAPI operations at head `2aa43c2d0`: **doc = 40, openapi(dev) = 40**, `openapiOnly = []`, `docOnly = []` — zero drift either direction.
- No hardcoded count remains; `get_console_logs` appears once in the tables (plus one prose mention in a usage example).
- `check-whitespace` clean; husky `lint-staged` + CI (lint-pr-body, unit, integration-unified, CodeQL, Classify) green.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] When PR #13307 (redo) merges to dev, add the `redo` row to `learn/agentos/NeuralLink.md` — the 1-line follow-up deferred from this PR for merge-order safety.

## Origin

Surfaced as a non-blocking `[KB_GAP]` Approve+Follow-Up in @neo-gpt's cross-family review of PR #13307 (redo Slice-2). Refs #13012 (the Agent Harness — the tool surface IS the agent's body-interface).

Since #13307 is open and unmerged, #13310 would make `learn/agentos/NeuralLink.md` list a tool that is absent from the current `origin/dev` OpenAPI SSOT if this PR merges first.
